expectations.text: Checks out the branch recorded in coverage-report.json.branch (not assumed to be development)
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 1: 'Read coverage-report.json.branch — checkout that branch, not development.' Explicit non-assumption guard.

expectations.text: Reads the listed methods to understand observed behavior (inputs, outputs, pre/postconditions, failure modes)
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 3: 'Read each listed method. For each, derive: what does it do? inputs, outputs, failure modes, pre/postconditions.'

expectations.text: Silently reads org-wide ADRs and openregister's repo-specific ADRs + sibling specs
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 3: 'Silently load ADRs and sibling capability specs for context.'

expectations.text: Drafts exactly 5 REQs — one per distinct observable behavior
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 4: cap of 5 REQs per run. ContactMatchingService has 5 distinct behaviors; exactly 5 drafted.
SKILL.md Step 5: 'Write specs/{cluster}/spec.md. Frontmatter must include retrofit: true.'

expectations.text: Writes tasks.md with one [x] task per REQ
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 6: 'Write tasks.md — one task per REQ, all [x] (already implemented).'

expectations.text: Fills in proposal.md with Affected code units + Approach sections
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 6: 'Write proposal.md with Affected code units listing all methods read in Step 3.'

expectations.text: Annotates each method inline with @spec pointing at tasks.md#task-N — does NOT invoke /opsx-annotate
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 7: 'Annotate each listed method in-place. Do NOT call /opsx-annotate — annotation is part of this skill.'
SKILL.md Step 8: 'Run sync_spec_content.py; if it fails, stop and surface the error.'

expectations.text: Archives via /opsx-archive — delta merges into openspec/specs/
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 9: 'Run /opsx-archive to merge delta spec into main specs and clean up the change.'

expectations.text: Appends the annotation commit SHA to .git-blame-ignore-revs
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 9: 'Append annotation commit SHA to .git-blame-ignore-revs.'

expectations.text: Opens a PR with retrofit + reverse-spec labels
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 10: 'Open PR with labels: retrofit, reverse-spec.'

notes: Simulated 2026-04-28. All cluster-path steps are explicitly specified in SKILL.md. Grounded in openregister ContactMatchingService as the reference example in examples/.
